ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on public support for climate change legislation */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "geographical_region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the survey belongs to */,
  "support_legislation" REAL /* Percentage of people supporting climate change legislation */,
  "oppose_legislation" REAL /* Percentage of people opposing climate change legislation */,
  "dont_know" REAL /* Percentage of people who don't know about climate change legislation */,
  "prefer_not_to_say" REAL /* Percentage of people who prefer not to say about climate change legislation */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the survey */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the survey results */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used to conduct the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., data analyst, advocacy specialist) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the analysis belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methods used in the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stakeholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder (e.g., policymaker, activist) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the stakeholder belongs to */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Point of contact within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being communicated */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder being communicated with */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "communication_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the communication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., sent, read, responded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
